SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHATTERJEE, SHOMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COVARIA, LUISA C/O IDEO $4,206.91 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,310.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
